key_events_next_24h.name: US GDP Q1 2026 Advance + PCE Release (BEA)
key_events_next_24h.note: Atlanta Fed GDPNow nowcast ~1.2% vs consensus 2.5-3.0%. Weak print = stagflation signal. PCE same release — hot PCE would compound bearish pressure. High volatility event.

key_events_next_24h.name: Spot BTC ETF Daily Flow Report
key_events_next_24h.note: Third consecutive outflow day feared: Apr 27 $263.2M + Apr 28 $89.7M already confirmed outflows. Continued outflow would confirm institutional retreat.

key_events_next_24h.name: FOMC Rate Decision (COMPLETED Apr 29)
key_events_next_24h.note: COMPLETED. Fed held 3.5-3.75% with unusual 8-4 dissent (last such vote Oct 1992). Powell's final meeting as Chair. Warsh nomination advancing. Historical: BTC drops after 8 of last 9 FOMC meetings within 48h — bearish pattern still in play.

key_events_next_24h.name: US-Iran / Hormuz Blockade (Ongoing)
key_events_next_24h.note: Brent >$104/barrel. No resolution imminent. Sustained oil pressure keeps inflation elevated, compounding stagflation risk.

key_events_next_24h.name: SEC Chair Atkins — Bitcoin 2026 Conference (Las Vegas)
key_events_next_24h.note: First major public speech on digital asset regulation. Atkins is pro-crypto — any positive regulatory clarity could provide a counter-rally catalyst.

notes: FOMC 동결 8-4 이견, $80K 이중저항, GDP·PCE 오늘 발표 예정

analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$76,160 as of Apr 30 04:10 UTC. Down from weekly high near $79K. Twice rejected at $80K resistance. Support ~$75,000. Volume declining — fragile, low-depth environment. 7-day price change: -3.7%. Fear & Greed Index: 47 (Neutral, recovering from 29/Fear last week).

analysis.macro_backdrop: Post-FOMC: Fed held at 3.5-3.75% with 8-4 dissent — most divided vote since Oct 1992. Powell's final Chair meeting adds transition uncertainty. Oil >$104 (Hormuz) keeps inflation elevated. GDP Q1 advance + PCE releasing today Apr 30 12:30 UTC — nowcast of ~1.2% vs 2.5-3% consensus would confirm stagflation signal. Two consecutive days of ETF outflows and $80K double top reinforce bearish short-term bias. Still within 48h post-FOMC window where historical BTC weakness is elevated.
analysis.regime_rationale: Bearish (0.65): Confidence raised to 0.65 — FOMC confirmed (bearish 8/9 pattern active within 48h window), 8-4 dissent policy uncertainty, $80K double rejection, two consecutive ETF outflow days, declining volume, Hormuz oil headwinds, weak GDP nowcast. Macro filter ACTIVE (>=0.5). Prefer SHORT bias or cautious HOLD. Next reassessment after GDP/PCE release (Apr 30 12:30 UTC).
